seoTitle: Wallanthery vs Wallarah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wallanthery and Wallarah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wallanthery and Wallarah.
heading: Wallanthery vs Wallarah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wallanthery, New South Wales and Wallarah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wallanthery has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Wallarah (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wallanthery or Wallarah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wallanthery has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Wallarah scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wallanthery scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Wallarah scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wallanthery or Wallarah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wallanthery has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
